name: GhostBattle Classic+
author: t-Ghost-t
description: GhostBattle_ClassicPlus overhauls the battle UI to make complex fights clear and easy to follow.
- Active battler highlighting that brings your current Pokémon forward in triple and double battles.
- A refined 'Classic+' UI style with dynamic type icons and battle alerts.
- Custom boss battle scenes making bosses compatible with Classic.
